_comment: 2026-06-17: ADX gates relaxed to 0 (adx_flip_min=0, dead zone off); bb_width_min=4 (low floor). rsi_extreme_override=30 + di_spread_override=20 added as smart bypass gates (RSI extreme / strong DI divergence override bb_width/adx/MACD gates). flip_window_bars=25 wide net. Prior analysis: bb_width 10-12=57.4% WR (n=129) vs 8-10=51.8%, 12-14=47.7%; ADX dead zone 25-30=47% WR. These gates are now bypass-able via rsi/di_spread overrides.
